mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_messages (event_id, event_type, aggregate_id, schema_version, payload, status) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{aggregateId}, #{schemaVersion}, #{payload}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbox_messages WHERE event_type = #{eventType}

SELECT id, event_id AS eventId, event_type AS eventType, aggregate_id AS aggregateId, schema_version AS schemaVersion, payload, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM outbox_messages WHERE status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_messages SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
